title: LEGO ONE PIECE Two-Part Animated Special Announced for September 29 Netflix Streaming
content: LEGO ONE PIECE 2-part animation special project has been announced, set to begin streaming on September 29 on Neflix. The project will highlight Usopp narrating the crew’s tales, and it’s described: “Witness the legendary tales of the East Blue and Grand Line like never before!
author: Anime Corner

title: MiSK Foundation's Investment Company EGDC Increases Stake in CAPCOM to 6%
content: Electronic Gaming Development Company (EGDC), an investment company wholly owned by Saudi Arabian organization MiSK Foundation (Mohammed bin Salman Foundation), submitted another Large Shareholding Report to the Kanto Local Finance Bureau on April 6.
author: ANN

title: 'As a Reincarnated Aristocrat, I'll Use My Appraisal Skill' Season 3's New Video Reveals Updated Staff, Fall Debut
content: The official website for the television anime of Miraijin A 's (also known as Jinei Mirai's) As a Reincarnated Aristocrat, I'll Use My Appraisal Skill to Rise in the World ( Tensei Kizoku Kantei Sukiru de Nariagaru - Jakushō Ryōchi o Uketsuidanode, Yūshūna Jinzai o Fuyashite Itara, Saikyō Ryōchi ni Natteta ) light…
author: ANN

title: Steam Implementation of Government Rating System in Indonesia Draws Criticism, Confusion
content: Steam began implementing ratings from the Indonesia Game Rating System for its Indonesian users on Sunday. The implementation has drawn some criticism and confusion from Indonesian users due to the ratings seemingly being inconsistent with the games' content.
author: ANN

title: Kill Blue Anime Starts Streaming on Multiple Platforms in N. America on April 11
content: DMM announced on Monday that the television anime of Tadatoshi Fujimaki 's Kill Blue manga will premiere globally on April 11, and will stream on seven streaming platforms in North America.
author: ANN

title: Crunchyroll Streams Kill Blue Anime in April
content: willCrunchyroll announced on Monday that it will stream the television anime of Tadatoshi Fujimaki 's Kill Blue manga as part of its spring anime season lineup for April. In addition, the anime's official X/Twitter account announced on April 1 that the anime will premiere on TV Tokyo , TV Osaka , TV Aichi , TV…
author: ANN

title: One Piece: Luffy’s Gear 5 Turned The Tide of The World
content: Warning: This article contains spoilers from the One Piece manga! The ongoing Elbaph Arc of One Piece is heading towards a crucial point of the Final Saga as the World Government prepares for the upcoming war.
author: ComicBook

title: Major Isekai Anime Hit With AI Allegations
content: The Spring 2026 anime season is finally here, and the lineup is as exciting as ever. Now that the Winter 2026 anime season has finally wrapped up, fans are all ready for a new season and a new set of releases and major anime returns.
author: ComicBook

title: 5th Live-Action Kingdom Film Streams Full Trailer
content: TOHO Movies streamed a new full trailer for Kingdom: Tamashii no Kessen (Decisive Battle of the Soul), the fifth live-action film of Yasuhisa Hara 's Kingdom manga, on Tuesday. Yasuhisa Hara 's historical manga centers around the slave boy Xin and his dream of becoming a great general for the state of Qin.
author: ANN

title: 5 Mind-Bending Anime Series You Can Binge Right Now
content: The most mind-bending anime series force viewers to really think about what they’re watching — and they make ideal binges, despite the additional effort they require. Any anime with solid pacing and a good premise can keep viewers engaged, but some of the best series are so thought-provoking, you’ll be thinking about…
